title: Bitfarms Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Results
text: Bitfarms delivered mixed results for Q4 2023 and full year 2023. For full year 2023, total revenue reached $146 million with net loss of $104 million or ($0.40) per share. Adjusted EBITDA was $35 million representing 24% margin. Full year 2023 BTC earned totaled 4,928 compared to 5,167 in 2022. Average direct cost per BTC was $15,200. Gross mining margin for full year was 44%. Company achieved debt-free goal in February 2024. Q4 2023 operating performance included earning 1,236 BTC. Hashrate increased 7% to 6.5 EH/s by December 31, 2023. Operating capacity reached 240 MW. Gross mining margin improved to 52% from 38% in Q3 2023. Q4 revenue totaled $46 million representing 34% increase from Q3. Gross mining profit was $23 million. Net loss for quarter was $57 million or ($0.19) per share. Direct cost per BTC was $16,200. Company secured 35,888 Bitmain T21 miners for installation in H1 2024 and targeted tripling hashrate to 21 EH/s by year-end 2024.
